zh.lifeSummary: 當Béatrice-Mathilde de Guînes於大約1130年出生在英國英格蘭波克夏哈尼 巴塞特時，她的父親Arnould de Guisnes I Comte Gand29歲，母親Mathilde de Saint-Omer26歲。她於1165年與Guillaume de Tingry結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1184年享年55歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Guînes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Guiney
meanings: Irish (Cork and Down): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Géibheannaigh, ‘son of Géibheannach’, from géibheannach ‘fettered’. See also Keaveny . In counties Kerry and Cork the name may possibly be a corruption of Ó Géibheannaigh.

en.lifeSummary: When Béatrice-Mathilde de Guînes was born about 1130, in Charney Bassett, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Arnould de Guisnes I Comte Gand, was 29 and her mother, Mathilde de Saint-Omer, was 26. She married Guillaume de Tingry in 1165. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died in 1184, at the age of 55.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Béatrice-Mathilde de Guînes est née environ 1130, à Charney Bassett, Berkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Arnould de Guisnes I Comte Gand, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Mathilde de Saint-Omer, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Guillaume de Tingry en 1165. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1184, à l’âge de 55 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Béatrice-Mathilde de Guînes um 1130 in Charney Bassett, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Arnould de Guisnes I Comte Gand 29 und ihre Mutter Mathilde de Saint-Omer 26. Sie hat 1165 Guillaume de Tingry geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1184 im Alter von 55 Jahren.

Lei sposato Guillaume de Tingry nel 1165. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1184, all'età di 55 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Béatrice-Mathilde de Guînes(이)가 대략 1130년 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르 차니 배싯에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Arnould de Guisnes I Comte Gand(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mathilde de Saint-Omer(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1165년 Guillaume de Tingry(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1184년 55세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Béatrice-Mathilde de Guînes родилась около 1130 г. в местности чарни бассетт, биркшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Arnould de Guisnes I Comte Gand было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Mathilde de Saint-Omer, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Guillaume de Tingry в 1165 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1184 г. в возрасте 55 лет.
